recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: A hiking trip into the wild turns into a desperate bid for survival for five friends on the run from a mysterious shooter.

recommendations.title: Backcountry
recommendations.overview: A couple on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

recommendations.title: Here Alone
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to survive on her own in the wake of a mysterious epidemic, which has decimated society and forced her deep into the unforgiving wild.

recommendations.title: Quicksand
recommendations.overview: A married couple on the brink of divorce becomes trapped in quicksand while hiking through a Colombian rainforest. It’s a struggle for survival as they battle the elements of the jungle and must work together in order to escape.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: Desperate to save their marriage, a young couple takes a deal to move into their dream home, but disturbing events reveal the house's troubled history.

recommendations.title: Zoo
recommendations.overview: A couple trying to save their marriage during a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Killing Ground
recommendations.overview: A couple's camping trip turns into a frightening ordeal when they stumble across the scene of a horrific crime.

recommendations.title: Pig
recommendations.overview: A truffle hunter who lives alone in the Oregon wilderness must visit Portland to find the mysterious person who stole his beloved foraging pig.

recommendations.title: Happiness for Beginners
recommendations.overview: At a crossroads after her divorce, a schoolteacher ventures toward a fresh start in life — and love — when she signs up for a grueling group hiking trip.

recommendations.title: From the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple on a trip through the Irish countryside find themselves hunted by a creature who only attacks at night.
